response:
```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    if s == s[::-1]:
        return s
    reversed_s = s[::-1]
    concat = s + '#' + reversed_s
    lps = [0] * len(concat)
    for i in range(1, len(concat)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and concat[i] != concat[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if concat[i] == concat[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    l = lps[-1]
    return s + reversed_s[:len(s) - l]

import sys
input_str = sys.stdin.read().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(input_str))
```
